overview: MindEase is a premium AI-powered mental wellness platform for students (ages 18-28). It features a context-aware AI chat assistant, mood tracking with progress visualization, guided breathing exercises, instant stress relief, and a beautiful glassmorphic interface with dark mode support.
features: Context-aware AI chat with conversational memory and emotion detection
Dashboard with mood trend graph, streaks, badges, and motivational quotes
Instant 'I Feel Stressed' relief flow with animated breathing circle
Daily mood check-in with emoji selector and weekly history chart
Dark mode toggle with complete glassmorphism design in both modes
Smooth 60fps animations using Framer Motion throughout
SOS emergency helplines with guided breathing
Self-help modules: breathing exercises, grounding techniques, focus, sleep
